introSection: Humpty Dumpty's Great Fall is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Storybook Land in Aberdeen, South Dakota, USA.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has a single helix.

fullText:
Humpty Dumpty's Great Fall is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Storybook Land in Aberdeen, South Dakota, USA.

The ride has a single helix.
